run_summary.summary: Apr 17 scan (fourth pass). Two new findings: BHG x Walmart — Gretta (people.inc) confirmed product shipment, most items arriving TODAY (Apr 17) with 3 more Saturday Apr 18, someone must be home to receive the table; Expert via Hawke Media — new contact Alisa Gofman replacing Carolina, call scheduled Wednesday Apr 22 at 10am PST. SOJOS, Aqara, and Flexsteel carried forward from previous passes (still pending application).

suggestions.message: 🚨 Products arriving TODAY (Apr 17) and Saturday Apr 18 — someone needs to be home to receive the table! Gretta will share tracking details this morning.
Call confirmed with new Hawke Media contact Alisa Gofman — Wednesday Apr 22 at 10am PST. She's replacing Carolina. Make sure to add it to the calendar!
Ruby updated the agreement with Kenny's requested dates — Video 1 draft by Apr 23, Video 2 in May. Review and sign the updated contract ASAP so Liz can start filming!
Reel went live Apr 16 — Liz confirmed and shared the link. Time to send the invoice!

Ian (Popfly) is nudging on the last video timeline — he's hoping it can wrap before May 12 (when Kenny's parents fly home). Kenny told him ~May 15 week. Worth a quick reply to Ian on which Steinhafels location they're visiting Apr 23.

deals.next_action: Receive product delivery — most items arriving today (Apr 17), 3 more Sat Apr 18. Someone must be home for table delivery.
deals.notes: [Apr 16]: Gretta Hegland (people.inc) confirmed product shipment for BHG x Walmart Spring Social Campaign. Most items arriving Apr 17 (today), 3 more arriving Apr 18 (Saturday). Someone needs to be home to receive the table. Gretta said she'll share tracking details Friday morning. Contact: gretta.hegland@people.inc

deals.notes: [Apr 16]: Ian Saunders (ian@popfly.com, Popfly agency) sent campaign upload link for submitting video drafts for review AND invoice once project is complete. Kenny shared filming timeline with Ian: Liz home weekend Apr 18–19, filming Video 1 early week of Apr 21, Steinhafels visit Apr 23, Video 1 draft by ~Apr 25, Video 2 draft early week of Apr 28–May 2 (after Steinhafels visit). Video 3 with parents planned for week of May 15 (parents fly home May 12). Ian asked which Steinhafels and hopes last video can be turned around sooner than May 12. Posting schedule: 1 week apart. Invoice submission link: app.popfly.com (Popfly campaign portal).
deals.activity_note: Apr 16: Ian (Popfly) shared campaign upload link for drafts and invoice. Kenny confirmed timeline — Video 1 draft ~Apr 25, Video 2 ~Apr 28–May 2, Video 3 ~May 15.
